schemes.name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
schemes.description: Income support to eligible farmer families with cultivable land.
schemes.offline_office: Nearest Agriculture Department office / Common Service Center (CSC)
application_steps: Verify Aadhaar and bank details
Get land records and ensure ownership is updated
Apply online on the portal or visit CSC
Track status using registration details

schemes.name: PMAY-G (Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin)
application_steps: Get household details verified by local body
Submit documents at Panchayat/BDO or as instructed
Complete verification and beneficiary selection process
Follow sanctioned construction milestones

schemes.name: PMEGP (Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme)
schemes.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
schemes.description: Credit-linked subsidy programme for setting up micro-enterprises.
schemes.offline_office: District Industries Centre (DIC) / KVIC / KVIB office
application_steps: Prepare a basic project report
Apply online on PMEGP portal
Complete bank appraisal and margin money subsidy process
Start enterprise and comply with documentation
schemes.benefits: Subsidy on project cost (varies by category/location)

schemes.name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP) - Scholarships
schemes.description: Centralized portal for various scholarship schemes.
schemes.offline_office: Institute scholarship cell / District education office (varies by scheme)
application_steps: Register on NSP and complete profile
Select the relevant scholarship scheme
Upload documents and submit application
Track status and respond to verification requests

schemes.name: PMJJBY (Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana)
schemes.description: Life insurance scheme at low premium for eligible age group.
application_steps: Visit bank branch or use netbanking (if available)
Provide Aadhaar and account details
Enroll and ensure auto-debit is enabled
Keep nomination details updated
schemes.benefits: Life cover of ₹2 lakh (subject to scheme terms)

schemes.name: PMBY (Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana)
schemes.description: Accident insurance scheme at low premium.
application_steps: Visit bank branch or use netbanking (if available)
Provide Aadhaar and account details
Enroll and ensure auto-debit is enabled
Keep nomination details updated

schemes.name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act)
schemes.description: Guarantees wage employment for rural households willing to do unskilled manual work.
application_steps: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat
Submit Aadhaar and bank details
Request work and get work allocation
Track muster roll and payments
schemes.benefits: Wage employment up to 100 days (subject to policy)
